channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Historic World Cup furor at 'incomprehensible' FIFA decision to let U.S. forward Balogun play
item.description: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling to let Balogun play despite getting a red card in his previous game. Belgium's statement ca...

item.title: Militant LGBTQ+ rights group 'the Lavender Panthers' was founded on this day in 1973
item.description: "Reverend Ray" Broshears founded the queer vigilante group the Lavender Panthers in 1973. The group's impact is still felt today.

item.title: Hate food waste? 7 creative ways to turn your leftovers into a new meal
item.description: We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes for leftovers. Here are seven dishes â like stuffed peppers and a biryani casserole â that...

item.title: Man files lawsuit against DHS after agents tracked him for sending critical email to ICE
item.description: Federal agents tracked David Streever to his home and hotel, leaving a warning notice about a critical email he sent to the former head of ICE.
